policy_exclusions: Cosmetic or aesthetic surgery and treatment including rhinoplasty, breast augmentation, liposuction, and skin lightening procedures not medically necessary
Self-inflicted injuries, suicide attempts, and deliberate harm
Treatment arising from or related to alcohol abuse, alcoholism, or intoxication
Treatment arising from or related to use of narcotics, illegal drugs, or substance abuse
War, invasion, acts of foreign enemies, hostilities, civil war, rebellion, insurrection, or military operations
Nuclear, chemical, or biological contamination or warfare
Treatment of sexually transmitted diseases except HIV AIDS which is covered after the specific waiting period
Experimental or unproven treatments not recognized by the Indian Council of Medical Research or equivalent international bodies
Organ harvesting or procurement costs for transplants covered separately under organ donor benefit
Weight loss programs, slimming treatments, obesity management without documented comorbid medical necessity
Dental treatments and oral surgeries except those requiring general anesthesia or arising from accidental injury
Vision correction procedures including LASIK and refractive surgeries
Infertility treatments, IVF, IUI, surrogacy, and assisted reproductive technology
Circumcision unless medically necessary and recommended by a physician
Injuries sustained during participation in professional or hazardous sports including motorsport, mountaineering above 5000 metres, skydiving, and bungee jumping
Outpatient consultations, investigations, and pharmacy unless specifically listed under outpatient benefit endorsement
Vitamins, supplements, health tonics, and protein powders unless specifically prescribed for diagnosed deficiency during hospitalization
Treatment outside India unless covered under specific international travel add-on endorsement
Genetic disorders and congenital conditions detected after policy commencement unless specifically included
Rest cure, convalescence care, and general debility without acute medical indication
Non-allopathic treatments except AYUSH which is covered up to the AYUSH sub-limit
